http://std.stheadline.com/instant/articles/detail/1020043-%E9%A6%99%E6%B8%AF-%E3%80%90%E9%80%83%E7%8A%AF%E6%A2%9D%E4%BE%8B%E3%80%91%E5%B8%82%E6%B0%91%E7%99%BC%E8%B5%B7%E5%8F%8D%E4%BF%AE%E8%A8%82%E9%80%9A%E5%AE%B5%E9%9B%86%E6%9C%83+%E7%AB%8B%E6%B3%95%E6%9C%83%E9%97%9C%E9%96%89%E7%A4%BA%E5%A8%81%E5%8D%80%E8%87%B3%E5%8F%A6%E8%A1%8C%E9%80%9A%E7%9F%A5

《逃犯條例》修訂引起極大爭議，政府堅持明日在立法會恢復二讀，有團體網上發起和參與當日變相罷市、罷課及罷工。民陣號召市民於明日早上10時於立法會大樓外集會，直到會議結束。今早立法會外已開始佈防，現場放置大量鐵馬，政總外亦已停泊多輛警車戒備，示威區即時關閉至另行通知。

立法會秘書處指，立法會將會暫時關閉示威區，並會要求警方在示威區及圓鼓底其他範圍候命和巡邏，以處理突發事件，示威區目前因需要維修損壞的設施而關閉。

今早立法會人員開始嚴密佈防，於通往政總沿路用鐵鏈鎖起鐵馬，並固定在燈柱。大批警員加強巡視及戒備。外圍亦已停泊多輛警車，警方亦已準備大量鐵馬作佈防。

在大樓示威區的入口位置，工人放置了多個鐵馬和雪糕筒限制出入，大樓外圍亦架設了多層鐵馬陣，鐵馬與鐵馬之間扣連，並加鐵鍊鎖上。

通往添馬公園的行人路亦都放置了鐵馬，添馬公園有部份範圍，以紅色膠帶封著。康文署貼出告示，指4月23日至6月16日，公園部份地方正進行草地保養。

我搵唔到樓主post戈份doc 下面第一段自己打 其餘source Google中釋英汁一汁.

It is laughable and ridiculous that while the basic law Article 27 grants citizens the freedom and right to associate, assemble, and process demonstrations, the government announces temporal maintenance near the demonstration area just one day prior to the second reading of the extradition bill. Below is the translated version regarding the announcement.

Restoring the second reading: The Legislative Council Secretariat immediately closed the demonstration area and asked the police to wait for patrol, concerning the possible protest on 12 June.

The Legislative Council will resume the Second Reading debate on the Fugitive Offenders Bill on 12 June. The Legislative Council Secretariat today informed Members that the Legislative Council's management committee has decided to temporarily close the demonstration area until further notice. The government says the police will be required to stand by and patrol the demonstration area and its near areas deal with emergencies.

The Secretariat states that it had contacted the police on the security risks faced by the Legislative Council and had sought police assistance to maintain public order in designated demonstration areas and Legislative Council Squares when necessary to ensure that those who disagreed were safe. Express opinions in the environment.

According to the police force, the Secretariat has proposed that the Executive Committee have adopted the following special arrangements, including from now on until further notice, the Legislative Council will temporarily close the demonstration area and will ask the police on standby in other areas of the demonstration area. The Secretariat pointed out that the order was made taking into account that many of the crowd control barriers as well as plant barriers in the demonstration area and the gates at the entrance to the Legislative Council Square were damaged and required to be repaired. Therefore, there were not enough physical barriers to help maintain the order of the demonstration areas. In addition, maintenance work carried out in the demonstration area poses a potential hazard to the public.

replies.msg:
The Secretariat letter pointed out that in view of the violence of the people who attacked the Legislative Council Complex on June 9 and 10, 2019, as well as the threat messages circulating on various social media websites, the Legislative Council Complex is about to review the fugitive offenders regulations. The risk of being hit again during the Legislative Council meeting is high. The security guards of the Secretariat have not been trained in handling similar gatherings and impacting complexes. They are not equipped with such equipment. Therefore, it is recommended to close the demonstration area, but the vehicular range of vehicles will remain open for users of the complex.

It depending on the circumstances, each Member is allowed to be accompanied with maximum 5 staff members.

The Secretariat will issue a color warning concerning the situation of the Legislative Council Complex and its vicinity. Should a yellow warning is issued, each Member has the most exception and has obtained the consent of the Administrative Committee. Only five staff members are allowed to go in the Legislative Council Complex; all persons entering the Legislative Council Complex, including but not limited to Legislative Council Members, Members of Members, staff members of Members, public officers, staff of the Legislative Council Secretariat and media representatives are required to undergo security procedures.
